nasb.text: Then Moses led Israel from the Red Sea, and they went out into the wilderness of Shur; and they went three days in the wilderness and found no water.

esv.text: Then Moses made Israel set out from the Red Sea, and they went into the wilderness of Shur. They went three days in the wilderness and found no water.

cnv.text: 摩西命以色列人從紅海起程，到書珥曠野去；他們在曠野走了三天，找不著水。

ccb.text: 摩西带领以色列人离开红海，来到书珥旷野，走了三天仍然找不到水喝。
